label: Q2 Volunteer locally or abroad - gain confidence
question: That’s interesting. When you do volunteer work, do you prefer helping locally in your community or volunteering abroad? Why?

statement_reason.full: I prefer helping locally in my community because it helps me gain confidence.

before_example.full: For example, in the past, I didn’t do much volunteer work in my local area, and I didn’t really interact with people in my community. I wasn’t very confident when talking to others, and sometimes I felt a bit uncomfortable.

after_example.full: But now, I volunteer locally. I help people in my community, and I have more chances to talk to them. Sometimes people thank me, and sometimes they even compliment me for what I do. So now I feel more confident when interacting with others, and I feel much better about myself.
